case_title: RHONA RODRIGUEZ VS. EDUARDO VELASCO JIMENEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-23-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT K.T. WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, RHONA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, EDUARDO VELASCO K.T. WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC. $3,485.98 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,550.98, I CREDIT PLAINTIFF'S SPECIFIC AND CREDIBLE DESCRIPTION OF THE ACCIDENT AND FIND THAT JIMENEZ SHOULD HAVE SEEN AND YIELDED TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLETION OF HER PARALLEL PARKING. THE DAMAGES CLAIMED ARE REASONABLE IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S PHOTOGRAPHS OF THE DAMAGE TO HER CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eduardo Velasco Jimenez appellant/defendant, who is assisted by Court Certified Spanish interpreter Shannon Raintree, #300563.
Rhona Rodriguez, respondent/plaintiff, assisted by ASL interpreter, Anna Mindess, #400007,
Appellant's witness Angel Marin Brito assisted by Court certified Spanish interpreter Nina Safdie, #292301 for witness. Interpreter oaths on file.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo, continued from February 7, 2019. The parties have signed a stipulation and order to use a pro-tem. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Rhona Rodriguez, respondent/plaintiff testifies on her own behalf. The following exhibits are introduced:

Respondent's Group Exhibit #1 - Photos of the incident, map, estimates document dated 9/4/18.
Respondent's Exhibit #2 - Video from CVS Pharmacy (for demonstrative purposes only)

Eduardo Velasco Jimenez appellant/defendant testifies on his behalf. The following exhibit is introduced:
Appellant's Exhibit #1 - Photos of vehicle and diagram

Angel Marin Brito testifies as appellant's witness.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. The Judge informs the parties the judgment will be mailed to them.

Judgment is ordered in favor of respondent/plaintiff Rhona Rodriguez and against appellant/defendant Eduardo Velasco Jiminez.
$3485.98 - principal
$65.00 costs
$3550.98 - total

All exhibits are retained by the Court.
The judgment on appeal is final and replaces the small claims judgment of 12/18/18.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliot Myles, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (525).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-07-2019 Continued To Mar-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eduardo Velasco Jimenez, for appellant/defendant, with representative Cathalo O'Riordan who is also present;
Rhona Rodriguez, for respondent/plaintiff, and is assisted by ASL Court Certified Interpreter, Jadine Murello, ID#400022, who is also present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The appellant informs the Court that a Spanish interpreter was requested but has not been provided. At the appellant's request, the Court continues the matter to March 7, 2019, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 525. The Court informs the parties that they are allowed only one continuance, and are allowed to bring their own interpreters for the next hearing. Both parties understand and waive formal notice.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Judgment Entered
